ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., Balance Sheet, Income Statement) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement was created */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company to which the statement belongs */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the statement */,
  "reporting_period" TEXT /* Reporting period (e.g., monthly, quarterly, yearly) */,
  "is_consolidated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the statement is consolidated */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the statement is a draft */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the statement */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last modification timestamp of the statement */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial statement to which the line item belongs */,
  "line_item_code" TEXT /* Code representing the line item (e.g., SC11, SC110) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line item */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the line item */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account to which the line item belongs */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the line item */,
  "is_forecast" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the line item is a forecast */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the line item */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the line item */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last modification timestamp of the line item */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the line item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_items_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_items_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_items_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial statement relevant to this period */,
  "period_label" TEXT /* Label of the reporting period (e.g., Mar 2010, Dec 2009) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the line item for this reporting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the period is a custom period defined by the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the period */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last modification timestamp of the period */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_periods_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_periods_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_periods_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance manager, auditor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user account */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last modification timestamp of the user account */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
